about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a passionate developer who loves creating beautiful and functional websites. With expertise in modern web technologies, I help businesses and individuals bring their ideas to life through clean code and thoughtful design.
about.extra: When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, learning new skills, or contributing to open-source projects.

education.program: BS in Computer Science - Software Engineering

projects.title: Red Warriors Ordering System
projects.description: Mobile and backend solution for the University of the East canteen, enabling advance student orders, real-time sales tracking, and inventory management.

projects.title: Heal App
projects.description: An OCR-driven prescription management application with mobile frontend and intelligent backend for medication scheduling.

projects.title: GengGengPy
projects.description: A programming language interpreter that uses Filipino street slang keywords to make coding accessible and culturally relevant.
